sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24113" key="dera/gxh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δερ-άγχη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">δέρη</etym>) <sense id="n24113.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">collar,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.109.3</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
